signals.headline: Charles Schwab Launches Spot Crypto Trading | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Charles Schwab Launches Spot Crypto Trading | YES | HIGH confidence**

Charles Schwab announced plans to launch spot crypto trading this year and suggested clients could allocate as much as 8.8% of a portfolio to Bitcoin.[2] This represents significant institutional adoption and mainstream legitimization of cryptocurrency investment.
